title: lyonia rubiginosa subsp. stahlii
intro: Lyonia rubiginosa subsp. stahlii, also known as Stahli's Lyonia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is a shrub native to the southeastern United States, known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's medicinal properties have been used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Lyonia rubiginosa subsp. stahlii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its health benefits, which also include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion.
